creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text: Just a reminder for me or somebody from python@. Any port that installs python egg extracted and have nose-based unit-tests in presense of devel/py-nose will create %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO/test_info.txt. I'm not sure atm how to deal with this properly. I can fix this for individual port, but the problem is more general.
